skills.name: Construction Negotiations
skills.description: Petra rolls out a barrage of bombs to attack the enemy. Inflicts the enemy with DEF Down for 2 turns with a 75% chance.Deals 4% increased damage for each Ignition stack, up to 5 stacks on attack, and removes all Ignition stacks after attacking.

levels.description: Petra rolls out a barrage of bombs to attack the enemy. Inflicts the enemy with DEF Down for 2 turns with a 75% chance.Deals 4% increased damage for each Ignition stack, up to 5 stacks on attack, and removes all Ignition stacks after attacking.

seEffects.buffDesc: Decreases DEF by 30%.

levels.description: Increases Petra's ATK by 5%.
Increases Petra's ATK by 5%. Grants self 1 stack of Ignition and increases self Action Gauge by 10% after an ally (excluding Petra) breaks an enemy's Toughness. Occurs once per turn.
